rows.label: qev041201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mumumumumu~ This is a problem-mo.
A complete and utter problem-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh? Do you have some business
with this caravan-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, we have absolutely no business
with you, so hurry up and leave-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_JNK0010
rows.name: Obey

rows.label: qev041201_SEL0011
rows.name: Leave as you were told.

rows.label: qev041201_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev041201_SEL0021
rows.name: Rebuke him for giving you orders.

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0004
rows.name: Oh? Oooooh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Actually leaving makes you
a totally boring guy-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm in a good mood today, so I
wouldn't mind being your
conversation partner for a bit-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'll even give you the special
privilege of listening to
Lord Mumun's troubles-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0008
rows.name: You should definitely do that-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0009
rows.name: Oh? Oooooh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Rebelling against me...
you've got some nerve-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are you acting so outrageously despite
knowing that I am Lord Mumun, the number
one disciple of bro Tsumuji-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0012
rows.name: Muha muha muhahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Your utter fearlessness made
me burst out laughing-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0014
rows.name:
You're an interesting guy-mo! I like you,
so I'll give you the special privilege of
listening to Lord Mumun's troubles-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0015
rows.name: You should definitely do that-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0016
rows.name:
This caravan has a lot of
regular customers-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Earthlings are particularly excellent clients
among them-mo. But they won't let Mumun be in
charge of such an important section-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Mumun's assignment is the Bias
gathered at the fortress located
towards the southeast-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm supplying them with a food called Eggui
that can be gathered around here, but
normally this isn't a job for a Nopon-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0020
rows.name:
I just had the assignment everyone
else hated pushed onto me-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Because those guys are huge-mo! They're
scary-mo! The other day, one of them even
told me he'd just eat me instead-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Those guys... were laughing
their heads off, so I know they
were just messing with me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0023
rows.name:
But you never know when a joke like
that might turn into reality-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0024
rows.name:
...That being said, they are still clients, and if
I asked to change my assignment here, bro would yell
at me for being a failure as a merchant-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Therefore... I'd like to ask you
to act as my guard so I can at
least avoid getting eaten-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Of course, this is a customer-facing
business, so you absolutely cannot go
around intimidating them recklessly-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0027
rows.name:
I just want you to pretend to be a business
partner and tag along with me-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041201_MSG0028
rows.name: I'm counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]
